title: senecio haenkei
intro: Senecio haenkei, also known as Jacob's ladder or Haenke's ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate the digestive system and alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio haenkei include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory problems, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote digestion. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity and should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
